nodes.name: 夜鷹目
nodes.summary: 夜鷹目（Caprimulgiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联83种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等83种鸟类。

nodes.name: 夜鹰属
nodes.summary: 夜鹰属（Caprimulgus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联40种鸟类，如Little nightjar、翎翅夜鹰、Standard-winged nightjar等40种鸟类。

nodes.name: 南蘇丹
nodes.summary: 南蘇丹是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联117种鸟类，包括非洲黑鴨、Schlegel's francolin、Heuglin's spurfowl等117种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Star-spotted nightjar
nodes.summary: The star-spotted nightjar (Caprimulgus stellatus) is a species of nightjar in the family Caprimulgidae. It is found in central Ethiopia, northern and northwestern Kenya and southern South Sudan. Star-spotted nightjar tend to inhabit low-altitude and dry habitats such as the lava-strewn fields, stony or sandy semi-deserts, drawf grassland as well as open bushland. Star-spotted nightjar share physical similarity with Plain nightjar (Caprimulgus inornatus) as they are both small to medium sized with proportionately large heads. Except the star-spotted nightjar have distinct white patch on its throat separated by dark line and corner of its tails. References

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: 星斑夜鹰
nodes.summary: 星斑夜鹰（Caprimulgus stellatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Star-spotted nightjar。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 夜鹰科
nodes.summary: 夜鹰科（Caprimulgidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联76种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等76种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。
